title: Define Wave 20 manager login-first and session introspection contract
description: Extend architecture docs with login-first bootstrap flow, auth/me contract expectations, role/scope guardrails, and UI state map for manager session lifecycle.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture defines manager login-first entry and session restore decision tree
Contract defines auth/me response and auth-session-v1 failure envelopes for 401/403
UX map includes login, unauthorized, session-expired, and post-login dashboard transitions
